final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input serial_in,
    output reg [3:0] shift_reg
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            shift_reg <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            shift_reg <= {shift_reg[2:0], serial_in};
        end
    end
endmodule
